executive_summary_zh: 今天候选内容整体偏弱，缺少关于 AI 编码代理、评测、harness 设计、MCP 或仓库理解的高技术深度文章。
唯一相对值得关注的是 GitHub Copilot 个人计划的容量与模型可用性收紧，这从侧面反映出生成式编码产品在推理成本、容量治理与服务可靠性之间的真实约束。
另一个可留意的基础设施变化是 GitHub 淘汰 HTTPS 中的 SHA-1，对企业内遗留 Git/HTTP 客户端与 API 调用链兼容性有排查价值，但与 AI 编码主题相关性较弱。
executive_summary_en: The candidate set is weak today, with no strong technical pieces on coding agents, evals, harness design, MCP, or repository understanding.

The only borderline-relevant item is GitHub's tightening of Copilot individual plans, which is still useful as a signal about inference cost, capacity governance, and reliability constraints in AI coding products.
A secondary infrastructure note is GitHub's SHA-1 HTTPS deprecation, relevant for legacy client compatibility audits but only loosely related to AI coding.

items.title: Changes to GitHub Copilot plans for individuals - GitHub Changelog
items.summary_zh: GitHub 宣布暂停 Copilot Pro、Pro+ 与 Student 的新用户注册，收紧个人计划使用额度，并将 Opus 系列模型从 Pro 中移除，仅在更高档计划保留部分可用性。
items.summary_en: GitHub announced a pause on new signups for Copilot Pro, Pro+, and Student, tighter usage caps for individual plans, and removal of Opus models from Pro while keeping limited availability in higher tiers.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这不是功能发布，而是容量与成本治理信号。对工程负责人而言，它说明主流 AI 编码产品已经进入更明确的配额分层、模型分级和可靠性优先阶段，团队采购、平台默认配置和开发者期望管理都应随之调整。
items.why_it_matters_en: This is less a product launch than a capacity and cost-governance signal. For engineering leaders, it shows mainstream AI coding products moving into stricter quota tiering, model segmentation, and reliability-first operations, which should influence procurement, defaults, and expectation-setting.
key_takeaways_zh: Copilot 个人市场出现注册暂停与额度收紧，表明需求、推理成本或容量压力已经影响产品策略。
高能力模型正被进一步绑定到更高付费层级，说明“模型选择”正在成为开发者工具商业化与资源治理的核心杠杆。
如果团队依赖个人订阅而非企业级协议，后续在可用性、预算和配额管理上可能面临更高不确定性。
key_takeaways_en: Paused signups and tighter caps suggest demand, inference cost, or capacity pressure is materially shaping Copilot product policy.
Higher-end models are being pushed into premium tiers, making model access itself a central monetization and resource-governance lever.
Teams relying on individual subscriptions instead of enterprise agreements may face more volatility in availability, budgeting, and quota management.

items.title: Sunsetting SHA-1 in HTTPS on GitHub - GitHub Changelog
items.summary_zh: GitHub 将在 2026 年 7 月进行 brownout，并在 9 月彻底禁用 HTTPS/TLS 中的 SHA-1，影响浏览器访问、Git over HTTPS、API 客户端以及相关依赖链上的旧软件。
items.summary_en: GitHub will run a brownout in July 2026 and fully disable SHA-1 in HTTPS/TLS in September 2026, affecting browsers, Git over HTTPS, API clients, and older software in dependent chains.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 虽然与 AI 编码不直接相关，但对平台与基础设施负责人有明确操作意义：很多企业内部仍存在过时 Git 客户端、老旧构建镜像、嵌入式 TLS 库或代理链路，若不提前审计，CI/CD、代码拉取和自动化集成可能在切换日失效。
items.why_it_matters_en: While not directly about AI coding, it has clear operational value for platform teams: many enterprises still have outdated Git clients, old build images, embedded TLS stacks, or proxy chains that can quietly break CI/CD, fetch/push flows, and automation on the cutover date.
key_takeaways_zh: 需要提前盘点所有通过 HTTPS 访问 GitHub 的浏览器、CLI、CI 镜像、SDK 与代理设备。
GitHub 提供 brownout 时间窗口，可作为兼容性演练和告警验证节点。
这是清理遗留加密依赖和升级开发基础镜像的好时机。
key_takeaways_en: Audit every browser, CLI, CI image, SDK, and proxy that reaches GitHub over HTTPS.
The brownout window provides a practical checkpoint for compatibility drills and alert validation.
This is a good forcing function to remove legacy crypto dependencies and refresh developer base images.

top_items: Changes to GitHub Copilot plans for individuals - GitHub Changelog
Sunsetting SHA-1 in HTTPS on GitHub - GitHub Changelog
new_terms_zh: usage tiering（按计划分层的配额治理）
themes_zh: AI 编码产品从增长优先转向容量与可靠性约束管理
开发平台正在通过分层配额与模型分级控制成本
基础设施兼容性治理仍然是开发者平台稳定性的底层前提
themes_en: AI coding products are shifting from growth-first to capacity and reliability governance.
Developer platforms are using tiered quotas and model segmentation to control cost.
Infrastructure compatibility hygiene remains a prerequisite for platform reliability.
implications_zh: 若你的组织正在标准化 AI 编码助手，应优先评估企业协议、集中配额管理和可替代供应商，而不是依赖员工个人订阅。
应把模型可用性、限额、退化行为和可观测性纳入内部开发者平台 SLA。
平台团队应立刻开始验证遗留客户端对 GitHub HTTPS/TLS 变更的兼容性。
implications_en: If your org is standardizing AI coding assistants, prioritize enterprise contracts, centralized quota governance, and fallback vendors rather than employee-level individual plans.
Include model availability, limits, degradation behavior, and observability in your internal developer platform SLAs.
Platform teams should begin validating legacy client compatibility with GitHub's HTTPS/TLS changes now.
reading_order: Changes to GitHub Copilot plans for individuals - GitHub Changelog
Sunsetting SHA-1 in HTTPS on GitHub - GitHub Changelog
what_to_ignore_zh: 忽略 GitHub Changelog 索引页本身，它不提供新增技术信息。
不要把 Copilot 计划调整误读为功能创新；它更像商业与容量管控公告。
what_to_ignore_en: Ignore the GitHub Changelog index page itself; it adds no new technical information.
Do not interpret the Copilot plan change as product innovation; it is primarily a business and capacity-control notice.
